requirement: Every paid image-generation HTTP attempt must fail closed before network access unless an explicit run authorization, provider-call ceiling, declared maximum unit cost and total dollar ceiling are present, and every material forge result must retain the authoritative per-attempt request ledger.

implementationEvidence.requestBoundary: provider_renderer reserves budget immediately before each provider POST attempt
implementationEvidence.retryAccounting: every retry consumes one authorized provider call
implementationEvidence.offlineFallbackBoundary: authorization and ceiling errors are rethrown and cannot be converted into offline fallback output
implementationEvidence.stateLocation: default paid-request state is outside the repository and can be redirected to a retained artifact path
implementationEvidence.stateIntegrity: call counts, attempt IDs, call numbers, statuses, unit cost and cumulative cost are validated before every read and write
implementationEvidence.atomicity: cross-process lock plus atomic replace prevents concurrent overspend and torn state writes
implementationEvidence.immutableCompletion: a reserved attempt can be completed exactly once with succeeded or failed status
implementationEvidence.providerIdentifiers: OpenAI and custom-provider request IDs are retained when available
implementationEvidence.forgeReceiptLinkage: passed, upgrade-needed and blocked forge receipts include the authoritative paidRequestLedger
implementationEvidence.zeroNetworkRegression: check_paid_forge_gate.py tests authorization, cost, state location, maximum-call enforcement, immutable completion and tamper failure without calling a provider

runtimeVerification: NOT APPLICABLE UNTIL MERGED AND A SEPARATELY AUTHORIZED CAPPED PAID RUN IS EXECUTED
remainingCaveats: Reserved cost is an authorization ceiling; provider invoice reconciliation remains a separate promotion receipt.
A provider response that supplies a separate image URL creates a non-generation download request; host and transport restrictions remain subject to provider-adapter security review.
No paid forge may run until explicit authorization and sufficient provider balance exist.
Asset promotion still requires successful/expected count equality, checksums, provenance, optimized derivatives, mobile crops, runtime wiring and visual review.
